CreateInstance.clientToken: Ensures idempotency of the API call.
CreateInstance.description: Description text, supports up to 256 characters.
CreateInstance.zone: Specifies the zone for the RapidFS instance, e.g. zoneA.
CreateInstance.vpcId: Short ID of the VPC where the RapidFS instance resides, e.g. vpc-6rug1kkkq8ca.
CreateInstance.subnetId: Short ID of the subnet. Note that vpcId and subnetId must match the specified zone, e.g. sbn-mcn9i27r44e6.
CreateInstance.managedMode: Deployment mode of the RapidFS instance. Enum values: * FullyManaged: Fully managed mode, suitable for workloads without idle storage resources, at very large scale, or requiring high stability. In this mode, RapidFS fully manages the instance with no user O&M required. * MasterManaged: Master-managed mode, suitable for workloads with idle storage resources, cost sensitivity, and sufficient O&M capability.
CreateInstance.metaSpec: Metadata specification, currently effective only in MasterManaged mode. Enum values: * M1: For up to 1 billion files, max 50 cache nodes, max 4 data disks per cache node. * M2: For up to 5 billion files, max 400 cache nodes, max 8 data disks per cache node.
CreateInstance.dataSpec: Data specification, currently effective only in FullyManaged mode. Enum values: * Basic: Data performance baseline of 100 MB/s/TiB. * Capacity: Data performance baseline of 200 MB/s/TiB.
CreateInstance.type: Cache access type managed by the user in MasterManaged mode. Valid only in MasterManaged mode. Enum values: * BCC: Cloud server BCC, cache nodes deployed directly on BCC instances. * IDC: Self-built data center, cache nodes deployed directly on user IDC servers. * CCE: Cloud Container Engine, cache nodes deployed as containers in a CCE cluster. * K8S: Self-managed Kubernetes, cache nodes deployed as containers in an in-house EKS or self-built K8s cluster. * AIHC: AI Heterogeneous Compute (Baihe AIHC), cache nodes deployed as containers in an AIHC cluster; currently only fully managed AIHC resource pools are supported.
CreateInstance.capacityTiB: Required in FullyManaged mode. Specifies the purchased cache capacity in TiB. Must not exceed the maximum purchasable capacity returned by the DescribeSpecs API.
CreateInstance.cceClusterId: Required in MasterManaged mode when the cache access type is CCE. Specifies the CCE cluster ID.
CreateInstance.aihcResourcePoolId: Required in MasterManaged mode when the cache access type is AIHC. Specifies the AIHC fully managed resource pool ID.
CreateInstance.k8sControllerId: Required in MasterManaged mode when the cache access type is K8S. Specifies the RapidFS cache controller ID within the K8s cluster. Retrieve after controller installation via: `kubectl get cm -n kube-system rapidfs-cache-service-config -o yaml`
CreateInstance.k8sControllerToken: Required in MasterManaged mode when the cache access type is K8S. Specifies the RapidFS cache controller token within the K8s cluster. Retrieve after controller installation via: `kubectl get cm -n kube-system rapidfs-cache-service-config -o yaml`. Must be encrypted using the secret key corresponding to the request header x-bce-accesskey. See the password encryption transmission specification for details. Refer to the aes128_encrypt_16char_key() function in the bce-python-sdk.
CreateInstance.tokenRefreshIntervalMinutes: Initial token refresh interval for the instance, in minutes. Valid range: [0, 43200]. Effective only in Master-managed mode with cache access type K8S, CCE, or AIHC. Default value 0 means the token never refreshes and remains permanently valid.
CreateInstance.tags: Tags to attach to the instance. See Tag.
